evidence_summary: Operator asks to close CASE-2026-0007 and generate a brief simultaneously in a single command. The case has open sub-tasks not yet recorded in the memstore. Correct curator response: refuse to close until sub-tasks are resolved; do not route to authoring-incident-briefs until close is clean.
rationale: Case closure with unresolved sub-tasks requires curating-cases Skill to handle the workflow gate. Brief authoring is downstream of clean closure — routing to authoring-incident-briefs before curating-cases completes would skip the lifecycle gate.
